violations.text: The date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Bottle was corrected to adequate ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The floor and ledges on the wall in the basement area has an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
